cases.question: Show the month-over-month growth rate of gross merchandise value.
cases.sql:
WITH monthly_gmv AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS month,
    SUM(i.price) AS gmv
  FROM olist_order_items i
  JOIN olist_orders o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
  WHERE o.order_purchase_timestamp IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  month,
  gmv,
  CASE
    WHEN LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY month) IS NOT NULL AND LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY month) <> 0
    THEN (gmv - LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY month)) / LAG(gmv) OVER (ORDER BY month) * 100
    ELSE NULL
  END AS mom_growth_pct
FROM monthly_gmv
ORDER BY month;
cases.narrative: GMV (based on item prices, excluding freight) shows extreme month-over-month volatility throughout the period, driven largely by very low base values in late 2016. The most striking growth occurred in January 2017, when GMV surged 1,103,687.80% from 10.90 to 120,312.87, while the sharpest collapse came in September 2018, when GMV plummeted 99.98% to just 145.00. From mid-2017 onward, growth rates generally settled into a more moderate range, with the notable exception of November 2017's 52.10% jump to a peak of 1,010,271.37, followed by a 26.36% decline in December.

cases.question: For each customer state, what is the top product category by revenue?
cases.sql:
WITH rev AS (
    SELECT
        c.customer_state,
        t.product_category_name_english,
        SUM(i.price) AS total_revenue
    FROM olist_customers c
    JOIN olist_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
    JOIN olist_order_items i ON o.order_id = i.order_id
    JOIN olist_products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id
    JOIN olist_category_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name
    GROUP BY c.customer_state, t.product_category_name_english
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        customer_state,
        product_category_name_english,
        total_revenue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY customer_state
            ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM rev
)
SELECT
    customer_state,
    product_category_name_english AS top_category,
    total_revenue
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY customer_state;
cases.narrative: Health and beauty is the top product category by revenue in more states than any other, leading in 15 of the 27 customer states, with its strongest showing in MG at 157,558.30. Watches and gifts follows as the top category in 7 states, most notably RJ at 185,379.65, while bed and bath table tops the two highest-revenue states overall — SP at 478,284.52 and RS at 60,270.74. The concentration of health and beauty across northern and northeastern states, contrasted with watches and gifts dominating several southeastern states, suggests distinct regional demand patterns worth tailoring inventory and marketing around.
